name: claudemon
description: Real-time session monitoring + bidirectional channel for Claude Code

api_key.title: ClaudeMon API Key
api_key.description: Your API key from app.claudemon.com. Go to Settings > API Keys to generate one.

imessage_notify.title: iMessage Notifications
imessage_notify.description: Send high-priority session alerts (crash, done, needs input, permission) to your iMessage self-chat. Requires macOS Full Disk Access.

self_chat_guid.title: iMessage Self-Chat GUID
self_chat_guid.description: Auto-detected by /claudemon:imessage. The chat GUID that notifications are sent to.
